title: Herbal Chicken Tagine
description: A traditional North African stew originating from Algeria, made with chicken, herby spices, and festive vegetables.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large clay or ceramic tagine over medium heat.
Add the sliced onions and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the sliced bell peppers and cook for another 5 minutes.
Add the chicken breasts and cook until browned on all sides, about 5-7 minutes.
Add the tagine spice blend, olives, thyme, and chicken broth.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 20-25 minutes.
Add the sliced carrots and continue to simmer for another 10-15 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through and the vegetables are tender.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh herbs, if desired.
